description: Compact mapping of raw NSCLC histology labels to normalized JSON histology buckets

notes.nsclc nos: Use all_nsclc by default unless source clearly operationalizes as non_squamous.
notes.adenosquamous carcinoma: Use all_nsclc in simplified models unless project-specific rules assign otherwise.
notes.sarcomatoid carcinoma: Use all_nsclc unless source provides explicit histology branch.
notes.pleomorphic carcinoma: Use all_nsclc unless source provides explicit histology branch.
